testCases.title: Promotions — DISCOUNT & COUPONS Section in Cart
testCases.notes: DISCOUNT & COUPONS section visible in cart at /cart. Located below the order summary. Sidebar shows available coupons for the current B2B org user.

testCases.title: Promotions — Available Coupons Listed
testCases.notes: 4 active coupons visible in DISCOUNT & COUPONS section: (1) $5 QA Fixed Dollar Off [Expires Jan 1, 2027], (2) 5% off cart subtotal Simple QA Coupon [Expires Jan 1, 2027], (3) 15% Register and get 15% for all [Expires Jan 1, 2027], (4) 10.00% QA Exclusivity Test - Globally Exclusive en [Expires Jan 1, 2027].

testCases.title: Promotions — Custom Coupon Code Input
testCases.notes: 'Custom code' input field present in DISCOUNT & COUPONS section. Allows manual entry of coupon codes. Text input (placeholder 'Custom code' or similar).

testCases.title: Promotions — View All Coupons & Promotions Link
testCases.notes: 'View all coupons & promotions' link present in DISCOUNT & COUPONS section. Links to /account/coupons or promotional listing page.

testCases.title: Promotions — Coupon Expiry Dates Displayed
testCases.notes: Each coupon shows expiry date: 'Expires Jan 1, 2027'. Expiry information visible to users without applying coupon. All 4 coupons expire Jan 1, 2027.

testCases.title: Promotions — Automatic Discount in Order Summary
testCases.notes: ORDER SUMMARY shows Discount -$0.01 pre-applied. Automatic promotion/discount applied without coupon code entry. Cart automatically applies eligible promotions. BL-PRICE-001 verified.

testCases.title: Promotions — Dollar Off Coupon Available ($5 QA Fixed Dollar Off)
testCases.notes: $5 QA Fixed Dollar Off coupon listed in DISCOUNT & COUPONS. Fixed dollar discount type visible. Expires Jan 1, 2027. Applicable to current cart.

testCases.title: Promotions — Percentage Discount Coupon (5% off)
testCases.notes: '5% off cart subtotal Simple QA Coupon' listed. Percentage-based coupon type. Expires Jan 1, 2027. Available for application.

testCases.title: Promotions — Registration Promotion (15% off)
testCases.notes: 'Register and get 15% for all' promotion listed (15%). Registration-triggered promotion. Available as coupon/promotion for registered users.

testCases.title: Promotions — Exclusive Coupon (10% Global)
testCases.notes: 'QA Exclusivity Test - Globally Exclusive en' (10.00% off) listed. 'Globally Exclusive' coupon type. Per promotion engine project memory: BestRewardPromotionPolicy prefers coupon-backed rewards over automatic ones (by design).

testCases.title: Promotions — Coupons & Promotions Account Page
testCases.notes: 'Coupons & promotions' link in B2B account sidebar navigation. Account-level coupon management accessible from account navigation. Separate from cart-level coupon application.

testCases.title: Promotions — Coupon Impact on Order Total (Pre-applied)
testCases.notes: Pre-applied discount -$0.01 visible in ORDER SUMMARY. Total = Subtotal $100.00 - Discount $0.01 + Tax $20.00 + Shipping $0.00 = $119.99. Automatic promotion applied correctly. BL-PRICE-001 verified.

testCases.title: Promotions — BestRewardPromotionPolicy
testCases.notes: Per project memory (project_promotion_engine.md): BestRewardPromotionPolicy prefers coupon-backed rewards over automatic ones (by design). Two evaluation policies are store-wide settings. Pre-applied -$0.01 discount is automatic promotion; coupon-backed would take precedence if applied.

testCases.title: Promotions — Coupon Code Apply
testCases.notes: BLOCKED: Entering coupon code in 'Custom code' field and clicking apply not triggered in this run. Would modify cart total and potentially interfere with downstream tests. Coupon code input verified present.

testCases.title: Promotions — Fixed Dollar Off Coupon Application
testCases.notes: BLOCKED: Applying '$5 QA Fixed Dollar Off' coupon would change ORDER SUMMARY. Deferred to preserve current cart state for suite 028/029 verification.

testCases.title: Promotions — Globally Exclusive Coupon Behavior
testCases.notes: BLOCKED: Testing exclusivity: when globally exclusive coupon applied, other promotions should be excluded. Requires applying coupon and verifying discount combination logic. Deferred.

testCases.title: Promotions — Cart-Level vs Product-Level Promotions
testCases.notes: Cart-level promotions: 5% off cart subtotal (Simple QA Coupon). Product-level: individual product pricing shows $99.99 vs $100.00 (product-level pricing discount). Both promotion types present.

testCases.title: Promotions — VCST-4896 Coupons Sidebar (Marketing)
testCases.notes: Per sprint notes (VCST-4896): [Marketing] [Cart] Coupons sidebar feature. DISCOUNT & COUPONS sidebar with coupon list and custom code input represents this feature. Coupon sidebar verified fully functional.

testCases.title: Promotions — Promotion Expiry Date Enforcement
testCases.notes: All visible coupons expire Jan 1, 2027 (future date). Active and valid coupons displayed. Expired coupons not shown in current active list.

testCases.title: Promotions — B2B Org Coupon Eligibility
testCases.notes: B2B org user (Carlos Rodriguez / BuildRight) sees 4 active coupons in DISCOUNT & COUPONS. Coupons applicable to B2B org purchasing context. Org-level coupon eligibility verified.

testCases.title: Promotions — Quote Request Available Alongside Coupons
testCases.notes: QUOTE REQUEST section visible alongside DISCOUNT & COUPONS in cart. Both features coexist in cart sidebar. B2B can choose between coupon checkout or quote-based purchasing.

testCases.title: Promotions — Shipping Promotion ($0.00 Shipping)
testCases.notes: Shipping cost $0.00 in ORDER SUMMARY. Free shipping applied (likely automatic promotion for BOPIS/pickup or catalog shipping rule). Shipping promotion applied to pickup orders.

testCases.title: Promotions — Tax Calculation After Discount
testCases.notes: Tax +$20.00 calculated on post-discount subtotal. Tax = $20 on $100.00 subtotal (20% rate). Discount -$0.01 applied before tax calculation. Tax applied to net amount.

testCases.title: Promotions — Coupon in Single-Page Checkout
testCases.notes: DISCOUNT & COUPONS section visible in single-page checkout (/cart). checkout_multistep_enabled=off: checkout is /cart. Coupon applied at checkout stage.

testCases.title: Promotions — Admin Promotions: Suite 023
testCases.notes: SKIPPED: Admin-side promotion configuration (Suite 023) is separate. This suite covers storefront-facing coupon behavior. Admin promotion management deferred to Suite 023.

testCases.title: Promotions — Admin Coupon API: Suite 025
testCases.notes: SKIPPED: Coupon API management (Suite 025 Backend/marketing/025-coupons-api.csv) deferred. API-level coupon CRUD covered separately.
